description_long: This crustacean features a broad, domed carapace with a pale, sandy coloration accented by dark, wavy striations. Its most striking features are the large, robust claws, which are dark at the tips and have blue highlights, giving them a dramatic appearance. Along the top of the carapace, clusters of small, blue mushrooms or fungal growths are scattered, adding a fantastical element to its otherwise naturalistic form. The legs are segmented and black, ending in pointed tips, and are arranged symmetrically on either side of the body. The underside and mouthparts are less visible, but the front view reveals a set of blue-tinted mandibles and subtle facial features. The overall impression is of a sturdy, armored crustacean with both natural and whimsical details, suitable for an urban fantasy or stylized environment.
description: A broad, pale crustacean with dark, robust claws and blue mushroom-like growths on its carapace. Its segmented black legs and blue highlights give it a striking, fantastical appearance.
description_view_0: The left side of the crustacean is visible, showing the curve of the large claw and a cluster of blue mushrooms on the carapace.
description_view_1: The front view highlights both claws, the blue-tinted mandibles, and symmetrical blue mushroom clusters on the carapace.
description_view_2: The right side is shown, mirroring the left with another large claw and additional blue mushrooms on the carapace.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the full width of the carapace and the distribution of blue mushrooms, with the legs and claws mostly hidden.
